
EXAMPLES FOR CHAPTER 3 - "Text".

The examples for this chapter require 44 KB.
			
Files contained in this folder:				
	Manifest
	P1.ps
	P2.ps
	P3.ps (*)
	Q1.ps
	Q2.ps
	S1.ps
	S2.ps
	S3.ps
	S4.ps
	Z1.ps
	Z2.ps
	Z3.ps
	beethovn.ps (*)
	bizcard.ps
	centtext.ps
	chezpier.ps (1)
	eggs.ps
	fadein1.ps
	fadein2.ps
	fadeout.ps
	fontres.ps (*)
	gtnberg1.ps (2)
	gtnberg2.ps (2)
	gtnberg3.ps (2) (3)
	intro.ps
	joplin.ps (*)
	lakewd1.ps
	lakewd2.ps
	lakewd3.ps
	lakewd4.ps
	lefttext.ps
	marker1.ps
	marker2.ps
	marker3.ps
	pith.ps
	planet.ps  (4)
	pscript1.ps
	pscript2.ps
	pscript3.ps (*)
	pscript4.ps
	rttext.ps
	serpent.ps (5)
	strings.ps
	supersub.ps
	treble.ps (*)

(*)	Requires PostScript Level 2.

(1)	The example chezpier.ps in the book should have used the
	Palatino-Roman font not the Times-Roman font listed in the book.
	Also there were two other lines misprinted. These examples
	changed the line reading
		2.1 inch 4.5 inch moveto		%  set current point
	in the book to
		0.25 inch 0.75 inch moveto		%  set current point
	and also changed the line reading
		2.125 inch 4.2 inch moveto		%  reset current point
	in the book to
		0.25 inch 0.25 inch moveto		%  reset current point

(2)	In each of the gtnberg examples on this disk, the line reading
		0.75 inch 6.0 inch			%  set current point
	in the book was changed to
		0.75 inch 6.0 inch moveto		%  set current point
	(The moveto command was omitted in the book.)
	
	Also, in the stringheight procedure a line was omitted in the book.
	These examples fixed the problem by adding this line:
		ury lly sub				%  return height
	as the last line in the stringheight procedure. Note: this does
	not apply to the file pscript4.ps which has a different version
	of the stringheight procedure.
	
(3)	There were three errors in gtnberg3.ps in the book.
	The example changed the line reading
		/str (GUTENBERG) def			%  define string
	in the book to
		/str (Gutenberg) def			%  define string
		
	The example also changed the line reading
		6.0 inch descender add			%  adjust y
	in the book to
		6.0 inch str descender add		%  adjust y

(4)	The example listing in the book contained the following errors.
	First, the example in the book omitted the call to the procedure
	BusinessCardOutline. Second, the line reading
		16 scalefont setfont
	should have read
		10 scalefont setfont

(5)	There were two lines in error as listed in the book. This example
	changed the line reading
		10 inch scalefont		%  scale font to required size
	in the book to
		8 inch scalefont		%  scale font to required size
	and the line reading
		2 inch 0.25 inch moveto		%  set current point
	in the book to
		2.25 inch 1.5 inch moveto	%  set current point

		

